examples: The result showed that hyphae of Tremella fruiting body can get nutrients through direct transmit of hyphae of Cohabitant fungi which means the existence of binding site.

If your cohabitant needs to have a long chat, she should take it outside.
And when a contemporary sense of warmth and livability is your calling card, it helps to have your cohabitant as your co-designer.
